title: Bonney Meets the Crew
description: On pages 3–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Kid, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Dorry as The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.
scene: The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's pirate Hunter Zoro, his bounty is $1.111 billion.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He knows you're in range for him to end you in an instant...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The same goes for Devil Child Rico Robin back there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But...!! What can they do against all the sea- beasts?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The strong can appraise their prey and prioritize the most essential targets first. You should have been more cautious!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those imbeciles around them lulled me into a false sense of security?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's something I want from you, so you'd better play nice... got it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I have an interest in that crew....!!*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, when I was a kid. It was still a pretty run-of-the-mill lab at the time though.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So, how come you came back?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm here for answers. I'll have that bastard's life if I don't like what I hear!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Vegapunk's the one... who turned my dad into a cyborg!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not... he's completely lost his sense of self.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He doesn't even know who he is anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's nothing but a living weapon now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We made it to the surface!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh yeah, I forgot to mention that I ran into SABO at Mary Geoise.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Whatever, I can spill the beans later.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There's all sorts of things up there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll be back after I take one for a ride!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey! We're infuriating this place, remember?!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Opening through 43 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
